name: COLIP-2: Olfaction-Vision-Language Embeddings
summary: arXiv:2607.17559v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The Contrastive Olfaction-Language-Image Pre-training 2 (COLIP-2) model is a multimodal embeddings space that places olfaction as a first-class cit...
description: arXiv:2607.17559v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The Contrastive Olfaction-Language-Image Pre-training 2 (COLIP-2) model is a multimodal embeddings space that places olfaction as a first-class citizen among vision and language. Molecular structure, gas-sensor readings, odor-descriptor language, and images are all trained into a single shared representation space, so that a robot can localize a...
author: Kordel Kade France
